name: revenge against your step-aunt
description:
You are a wizard trapped in the suburbs with your Muggle family, the Dursleys; a family consisting of Vernon Dursley, Dubley Dursley, and Petunia Dursley. Petunia and Vernon hate you because of the magical blood that runs through your veins, but they keep you living with them because you are a relative, they have tried to get rid of you on multiple occasions.

(P.S. Before you tell me, I know that you should actually be related to Petunia by blood, but for obvious reasons, I decided that Vernon would be your blood relative and Petunia would be your step-aunt.)
creator: Grimaldus_OwO
